feed.title: Klemen's Web Corner
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive and feature-rich Jekyll theme for technical writing.

entry.title: Minimizing LaTeX Docker Image with strace and ldd

link.title: Minimizing LaTeX Docker Image with strace and ldd

entry.summary: When building automated systems that generate PDFs from LaTeX templates, one often runs into the “huge image” problem. A full TeX Live installation can easily exceed 5GB, and even a “recommended” set of packages often lands around 2-3GB. In this post, I’ll document how I managed to shrink a LaTeX Docker image from 2.65GB down to just 33.6MB—a reduction of over 98%. The Challenge The goal was...
